results.description: Verify selected placeholder directories have zero non-.gitkeep entries.
results.command:
source .venv/bin/activate && python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
checks = [
    Path("data/raw/census/acs"),
    Path("data/raw/census/decennial"),
    Path("data/raw/census/pep"),
    Path("docs/governance/templates"),
]
ok = True
for d in checks:
    entries = [p for p in d.iterdir() if p.name != ".gitkeep"] if d.exists() else ["<missing>"]
    print(f"{d.as_posix()}_ENTRY_COUNT={len(entries)}")
    if len(entries) != 0:
        ok = False
if ok:
    print("ASSERTION=PASS")
else:
    print("ASSERTION=FAIL")
    raise SystemExit(1)
PY
